name: Shadow Agent Discovery
description: Detects unauthorized or unregistered Copilot agents by comparing the tenant inventory against an approved registry. Produces a shadow IT risk report, dashboard, and notification emails.

triggers.description: Activates when user mentions shadow agents, unauthorized deployments, or agent discovery sweeps
daily-shadow-scan — Scans for shadow agents every day at 03:00

actions.name: run-discovery-sweep
actions.description: Compare tenant agent inventory against the approved registry to identify shadow agents

inputs.name: scope
inputs.description: Scope: tenant-wide, department, or specific user

inputs.name: includeStoreApps
inputs.description: Include store-published apps in the sweep

outputs.name: shadowAgents
outputs.description: List of agents not in the approved registry

outputs.name: riskReport
outputs.description: Risk assessment for each shadow agent

actions.name: generate-shadow-report
actions.description: Generate a shadow IT risk report with findings and remediation recommendations

outputs.name: reportUrl
outputs.description: URL to the generated shadow IT report

outputs.name: notificationEmails
outputs.description: Draft notification emails for agent owners

actions.name: quarantine-agent
actions.description: Quarantine a shadow agent pending governance review

outputs.name: quarantineResult
outputs.description: Quarantine action result and audit record

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: Shadow agents flagged as security findings
Shadow agents may require retroactive change requests

hitlControls.reason: Blocking an agent requires security team approval
Quarantining multiple agents requires CISO approval

knowledgeSources.description: All agent packages from Package Management API
Organization's list of approved and registered agents
Shadow IT detection and remediation policies
